iteration_history.changes: Replaced minimal nano-pdf CLI-only skill with comprehensive PDF operations guide covering pypdf for text extraction, merging, page counting, structured data extraction, and metadata. Added explicit examples for JSON output and number parsing.

Added explicit WARNING against using reader.metadata for titles/authors (returns 'untitled'/'anonymous'). Added detailed instructions to extract titles and authors from visible page text instead, with concrete example.

key_changes: Expanded skill from nano-pdf CLI-only to full PDF operations including pypdf
Added structured data extraction workflow with Python examples
Added explicit warning: never use reader.metadata for titles/authors, always parse visible page text
Added rules for number formatting (remove $ and , for JSON output)
